title: 🏷️ MAGAZINE
data_structure:
\[
  {
    "name": "name",
    "mandatory": true,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "Top Gear"
  },
  {
    "name": "founded",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "number",
    "example": "1993"
  },
  {
    "name": "defunct",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "number",
    "example": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "focus",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "sports cars"
  },
  {
    "name": "publication\_frequency",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "monthly"
  },
  {
    "name": "single\_copy\_price",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "number",
    "example": "5.99"
  },
  {
    "name": "single\_copy\_price\_unit",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "£"
  },
  {
    "name": "publication\_format",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "print"
  },
  {
    "name": "circulation",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "number",
    "example": "150884"
  },
  {
    "name": "circulation\_year",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "number",
    "example": "2013"
  },
  {
    "name": "publisher",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "Immediate Media Company"
  },
  {
    "name": "issn",
    "mandatory": false,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "1350-9624"
  }
]
